creator: ice@extreme.hu
text:
Per https://developers.librepcb.org/d5/d96/doc_building.html#autotoc_md11, Open Cascade is necessary only for certain bits of the workflow, and while 3D looks gorgeous on screen, it is quite conceivable not everyone stricly needs or wants it. Considering this and especially Open Cascade's heft, please consider making it an option (via whatever mechanism is suitable).

Thank you.
